daily_fact: A Clifton Park man has showcased his incredible craftsmanship by carving a detailed replica of New York City out of balsa wood, celebrating the city's iconic skyline and spirit.
topline_md: A plane crashed into the Hudson River, NYPD increased security amid Iran-related protests, and power was restored after an outage affecting Staten Island, while NYC faces ongoing issues with crime, homelessness, and public safety measures.
